strengths: 10+ years of full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Java
Current role involves AI agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, matching the AI agent requirement
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, Vitest-adjacent tooling, workshops on testing)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited evidence of recent Kotlin work; Java experience is older (robotic arms era)
Cloud experience appears AWS-focused; no clear GCP/Azure or Kubernetes-at-scale signals beyond GISCollective

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience

response.justification: Candidate has well over the 6+ years required, with current hands-on work in TypeScript/Node and AI agent infrastructure that directly maps to the role. Strong engineering craftsmanship (TDD, testing workshops, founding an open-source platform) and relevant React/MongoDB/AWS experience from Optilyz reinforce fit. The main gap is no explicit Nest.js, and Java/Kotlin exposure is dated, but the core stack alignment and AI-agent work outweigh those concerns.
